sglang.title: [fix] remove `cuda_device_count_stateless`
sglang.author: Alcanderian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Remove deprecated funtion  cuda_device_count_stateless.
Besause the issue has been fixed in torch version 2.5.1, refer to: https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/blob/v2.5.1/torch/cuda/__init__.py#L896
def device_count() -> int:
    r"""Return the number of GPUs available."""
    global _cach

As mentioned in the comment to the original  PR enabling custom allreduce on ROCM, device capability on RocM is not sequential so the way we enable custom allreduce for MI300 should be changed.
This PR adds use_custom_allreduce method to platform class letting enable custom allreduce for ROCM platfo

vllm serve Qwen/Qwen2-1.5B-Instruct -pp 2
...
INFO 04-04 11:36:58 [config.py:1591] Defaulting to use mp for distributed inferen

vllm.title: [V1] DP scale-out (1/N): Use zmq ROUTER/DEALER sockets for input queue
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
So that a single queue / socket address can be used for all engines.
This also flips the front-end to bind the input socket and engines to connect to it, and changes to use this socket for the startup ready signal rather than a separate pipe which avoids a race condition (where the front-end could s

vllm.title: [V1] Scatter and gather placeholders in the model runner
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is an attempt to move scatter_patch_features and gather_patch_feature into the model runner (outside of the model) to avoid interfering with TPU graph compilation.
Breaking change for model developers:

PromptUpdateDetails.features has been replaced with PromptUpdateDetails.is_embed. You can

vllm.title: [Misc] Auto detect bitsandbytes pre-quantized models
vllm.author: tristanleclercq
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR removes the need to explicitly pass the --quantization bitsandbytes engine parameter to load a model pre-quantized with bitsandbytes.
The logic within EngineArgs.create_model_config (in particular in ModelConfig._verify_quantization already auto-detects the quantization method from the model
